description: Diagnose the fuel economy drop in the fill-up dataset and identify poor performance patterns. The final output must feature cleaned data with standardized categories, no duplicates, and calculated MPG values. Apply conditional formatting to highlight the performance trends.

natural_language.prompt: A car owner's fuel economy dropped from 32 MPG to much lower values. Clean their messy fill-up log, calculate MPG for each tank using formulas, remove the duplicate entry, standardize weather and AC usage categories, create performance categories (Good/Fair/Poor), and apply conditional formatting to highlight tanks with MPG below 30.
